evals.prompt: Update macios from Xcode current to Xcode vNext beta/rc. Ignore tests for now and validate with make world.
evals.expected_output: Updates non-test version files, installs missing Xcode components if needed, and reports successful make world run.

evals.prompt: Now bring in XTRO changes for the Xcode vNext beta bump and ensure AUTO_SANITIZE run succeeds.
evals.expected_output: Runs xtro-sharpie, applies unclassified2todo when needed, reruns successfully, and reports resulting test file diffs.

evals.prompt: Validate introspection tests for iOS, tvOS, macOS, and Mac Catalyst after this Xcode beta update.
evals.expected_output: Runs build+run introspection commands for all platforms and reports per-platform pass status.
